## Frame 1 (0.0s)

### Detailed Description
- The frame depicts a wide-angle, fisheye-view shot of a narrow, brightly lit hallway inside a building.
- The floor has a pattern of white and brown tiles, with the brown tiles forming a zigzag or chevron-like design leading into the distance.
- On the right side, there is a gray metal door with a red "FIRE EXIT" sign and a blue "EXIT" sign above it.
- Above the fire exit door, a red fire alarm box is mounted on the wall.
- To the left of the fire exit, there are two elevators with gray doors; one has a blue "EXIT" sign above it, and the other has a blue sign that appears to be a "1" or similar indicator.
- The ceiling has fluorescent lights and exposed red pipes running along the left side.
- The timestamp at the bottom of the frame reads "150 98 2,62 - 02/09/2019 14:59:58".
